chunks.title: Wisdom's Call and Benefits
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Wisdom invites people to listen and describes the value of her presence.

chunks.title: Wisdom's Pre-Existence
chunks.reason: A distinct section where Wisdom recounts her existence before creation and role beside God.

chunks.title: Final Appeal to Listen
chunks.reason: A concluding call to action urging listeners to heed Wisdom's words for life or death.
